name: Narrator - Standard
instructions: Speak in a clear, neutral, and steady narration voice.

name: Narrator - Fast
instructions: Speak in a clear and neutral tone, but at a slightly faster pace.

name: Character - Energetic
instructions: Speak in a cheerful and positive tone, with a youthful energy.

name: Character - Deliberate
instructions: Speak in a deep, resonant, and serious tone. Pace the words slowly.

name: Whisper
instructions: Speak in a soft, quiet whisper.
